what_was_done: Graduated framework domain (105+ L1 memories + L2 terminal history → mastery.md, ~700 tokens). Renamed knowledge.md → mastery.md across 6 files to avoid ChromaDB naming collision. Optimized CLAUDE.md from ~996 to ~625 tokens/prompt (37% reduction) by removing redundant gates listing, session handoff, and domain mastery sections. Created backupclaude.md safety copy.
